    outbox-publisher 0.4.3 API

    Modules
    Module
    Description
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.core
    Public API of the outbox-publisher library: the Outbox interface, the OutboxEvent record, and the OutboxException type.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    JDBC-backed implementation of Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer
    Optional Micrometer instrumentation for Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel
    Optional OpenTelemetry tracing for Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
     
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck
    Technology Compatibility Kit (TCK) for OutboxDialect implementations.
